source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes
Draft
April 29, 2026
Abstract
For fixed h, let N(h,k) be the least N such that every cardinality |hA| attained by a
k-element set of integers is also attained by a k-element subset of {1,...,N}. We prove,
using Rajagopal’s fixed-h theorem on the range of possible values of |hA|, that
N(h,k)≤kCh
for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out
at the level of the low-degree Hilbert functions, which are the only data relevant to h-fold
sumsets when h is fixed.
title: 步骤_step1 (定义 N(h,k) 为最小整数...)
description: 定义 N(h,k) 为最小整数 N，使得任何 k-元整数集 A 的 h-重和集大小 |hA| 都能被某个位于 [1,N] 内的 k-元子集达到 [核心键点: 固定h，问题转化为寻找足够小的区间来压缩和集大小集合; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: def N (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := sorry

title: 步骤_step2 (引用 Rajagopal 的固...)
description: 引用 Rajagopal 的固定-h 定理，该定理刻画了 |hA| 所有可能的取值 [核心键点: Rajagopal 定理给出了固定 h 下 |hA| 的取值范围的有限性; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: theorem rajagopal_fixed_h (h k : ℕ) : ∃ (C : ℕ), ∀ (A : Finset ℤ), A.card = k → |h • A| ≤ C := sorry

source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes

April 29, 2026

title: 步骤_step3 (证明 N(h,k) ≤ k^{...)
description: 证明 N(h,k) ≤ k^{C h}，其中 C 为某个依赖于 h 的常数 [核心键点: 构造具有多项式直径的块，代替 Rajagopal 原始构造中的稀疏几何块 ; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: theorem N_polynomial_bound (h k : ℕ) : ∃ (C : ℕ), N h k ≤ k ^ (C * h) := sorry

title: 步骤_step4 (在低次希尔伯特函数的层面实施替...)
description: 在低次希尔伯特函数的层面实施替换，这正是固定 h 时与 h 重和集相关的唯一数据 [核心键点: 希尔伯特函数的低次部分控制着多项式压缩的可能性; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: definition hilbert_function (A : Finset ℕ) (d : ℕ) : ℕ := sorry

source_snippet:
1 Introduction
For a finite set A ⊂ Z and a positive integer h, write
hA = {a +···+a : a ∈ A}
1 h i
with repetitions allowed. Define
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊂ Z, |A| = k}.
Let N(h,k) be the least positive integer N such that
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊆ {1,...,N}, |A| = k}.
Equivalently, one may work in intervals [0,N −1] and translate at the end.
The purpose of this note is to prove the following polynomial compression bound.
title: 步骤_step1 (介绍基本符号和定义：对于有限整...)
description: 介绍基本符号和定义：对于有限整数集A和正整数h，hA表示所有可能的h个元素和（允许重复）的集合。 [核心键点: 定义hA和集合R(h,k); 来源: p1_s22 页1]
lean_code:

title: 步骤_step1 (提出定理及其条件：对每个固定 ...)
description: 提出定理及其条件：对每个固定 h ≥ 1，存在常数 C，使得对所有 k ≥ 2，有上界不等式 N(h,k) ≤ k^{C h}。 [核心键点: 定理陈述：上界估计 N(h,k) ≤ k^{C h}; 来源: p1_s999 页1]
lean_code:
theorem theorem_1_1 (h : ℕ) (hpos : h ≥ 1) : ∃ (C : ℝ), ∀ (k : ℕ) (kpos : k ≥ 2), N h k ≤ k^(C * h) := by
  sorry

title: 步骤_step2 (说明证明方法：使用 Rajag...)
description: 说明证明方法：使用 Rajagopal 定理，并引入记号 M_{h,k}、K_{h,k} 和集合 Δ_{h,k} 的定义。 [核心键点: 定义记号：M := hk - h + 1, K := C(h+k-1, h), Δ := 一些区间的并集; 来源: p1_s999 页1]
lean_code:
noncomputable def M (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := h*k - h + 1
noncomputable def K (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := Nat.choose (h+k-1) h
def Delta (h k : ℕ) : Set ℕ :=
  ⋃ (ℓ : ℕ) (_ : ℓ ≤ min h k - 3), 
    Icc (M h k + ℓ*h + 1) (M h k + ℓ*h + (h-2-ℓ))
